A soil that is white, red, yellow and black is beneficial to the
Brahmanas, Ksatriyas, Vaisyas and Sudras respectively. Similarly
if it smells like ghee, blood, food and liquor, it is good for the four
classes in order. It is also favourable for these classes in their order,
if it is covered with the four kinds of grass viz. the holy Darbha,
^ara, Durva and Ka^a. Likewise, a sweet, astringent, sour and pun-
gent soil bestows prosperity on these classes in order.
